url.description:
A URL or URL template specifying where the results shall be written. Supported formats:
  • a valid Google Cloud Storage URL, e.g. `gs://my-bucket/some-folder`. A subdirectory will be created for this statistical batch request, named after the request ID, and output JSON files will be stored there. This is equivalent to the template `gs://my-bucket/some-folder//.json`.
  • a templated Google Cloud Storage URL, e.g. `gs://my-bucket/some-folder/.json`. Templating allows custom organization of the output files. Templates can contain the following placeholders, which are replaced by respective actual values when writing results:
    • `` - the ID of your statistical batch request,
    • `` - the `id` property of the feature,
    • `` - the `identifier` property of the feature.
    The template must contain `` or `` in order to ensure unique output files.

credentials.description: Base64-encoded service account credentials in JSON format.
